_note: TENT (Wang et al., ICLR 2021) on GroundingDINO. Gradient-based TTA via entropy minimisation on LayerNorm gamma/beta. Filters and detector model match the headline GD configs so the comparison against vanilla / BCA+ / STAD / TRUST is matched-protocol.

params._comment_lr: Standard TENT lr; back off to 1e-4 if entropy collapses on long streams.
